title: HTTP Server
description: Basic REST API server with CRUD endpoints, Redis caching, and structured responses.

title: gRPC Server
description: Build a gRPC service with protocol buffers, streaming, and automatic observability.

title: Publisher
description: Publish messages to Kafka, Google Pub/Sub, NATS, or MQTT with a unified API.

title: Subscriber
description: Subscribe to message topics with automatic offset management and error handling.

title: HTTP Server with Redis
description: REST API backed by Redis for caching and session management.

title: REST Handlers
description: Auto-generate CRUD endpoints by implementing the REST interface.

title: Data Migrations
description: Run versioned schema migrations across MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, and MongoDB.

title: GraphQL API
description: Schema-first GraphQL with resolvers, playground, and built-in observability.

title: WebSocket
description: Real-time bidirectional communication with WebSocket support.

title: Cron Jobs
description: Schedule recurring tasks with cron expressions and automatic metrics.

title: Custom Metrics
description: Publish application-specific Prometheus metrics alongside built-in observability.

title: HTTP Service Communication
description: Make inter-service HTTP calls with circuit breaker and retry support.

title: Auth Middleware
description: Protect endpoints with Basic Auth, API Key, or OAuth middleware.

title: File Handling
description: Upload, download, and manage files with local, S3, GCS, or FTP backends.

title: File Binding
description: Bind uploaded files directly to structs for type-safe file processing.

title: HTML Templates
description: Serve server-rendered HTML pages with Go template support.

title: CLI Application
description: Build command-line tools with subcommands, flags, and structured output.
